title: Foundation Pack (By Jonathan)
description: A good starting point for making your own modpack, with optimizations and basic mods usually in modpacks.
body:
# Foundation Pack  

**Foundation Pack** is a lightweight modpack designed to provide a stable and optimized base for building your own Minecraft experience. It includes performance improvements, quality-of-life features, and visual enhancements without changing core gameplay.  

## Features  
- **Performance Optimizations** – Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, Entity Culling  
- **Visual Improvements** – Iris Shaders, Complementary Unbound, Fresh Animations, LambDynamicLights  
- **Navigation & Utility** – Xaero’s Minimap & World Map, Jade, Just Enough Items, Nature’s Compass

Ideal for those starting out with modpacks or looking for a smooth, optimized experience with essential features while keeping the game close to vanilla.
